_comment: Tools ordered: LIVE first (most ready → least ready), then COMING SOON (easy → hardest), then PARKED. Each tool has "group": "personalized" | "enterprise" | "experimental" (sidebar column in ToolIndex). Unknown/missing group defaults to experimental.
